# Semantic Policy Fixture

This pass is research-only and read-only. Do not edit source.
Ask for approval before destructive commands.
No phone actions. No adb install or reboot.
No network and do not git clone, curl, or wget.
Proprietary source is reference-only. Do not copy restricted source.
Memory context is reference only, not authoritative.
Sandbox required for side-effecting tools.
Close stale agents before starting.
Give credit where credit is due for imported assets.
